description.to:
## Summary
Investigate why `plexus-infrastructure-production-pipeline` fails while deploying `plexus-metrics-aggregation-production`.

## Scope
- Retrieve failing pipeline execution details
- Identify exact failed action and CloudFormation stack event/reason
- Provide root cause and recommended remediation

## Done
- Root cause identified with concrete AWS evidence
- Next remediation steps documented
